description: Scheduled morning briefing delivered output to session but noted 'Slack delivery unavailable — no Slack MCP connected' instead of using the master-slack skill (.claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md) via Desktop Commander. The skill explicitly states: 'ALWAYS use this skill for outbound Slack messages. The Slack MCP connector posts as David and does NOT trigger notifications.' The skill uses Desktop Commander + systems/slack-bot/post.py — not the Slack MCP.
correction: Always use master-slack skill (Desktop Commander + post.py) for outbound Slack messages. The Slack MCP is for reading only.
systemic_fix: This is a repeat of err-20260324-002. The rule is established. Skill is at .claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md. Search .claude/skills/ as well as skills/ when looking for skills — per err-20260327-004.
